selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a widening Moody's Baa corporate-bond spread relative to the 10-year Treasury is treated as a deterioration in credit conditions and favors broader SPY exposure; an equal or narrower spread favors QQQ exposure
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this official corporate-credit-risk allocation mechanism is distinct from the permanently closed price, volatility, labor, inflation, policy-rate, production, consumption, housing, currency, commodity, seasonal and facility-liquidity lineages

program_multiplicity.method: Bonferroni across exactly the three frozen Epoch 2 mechanisms

signal.source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis BAA10YM real-time history distributed through official ALFRED
signal.formula: at each decision cutoff, select the latest eligible official monthly BAA10YM observation and its exact prior-calendar-month observation; delta_t=current_percent-prior_month_percent
signal.target_rule: strictly positive delta_t means SPY weight 1.0; equal or negative delta_t means QQQ weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: an ALFRED realtime_start date is conservatively available only at 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York; values later than the frozen cutoff are excluded
signal.calendar_month_rule: the previous reference must be exactly the first day of the calendar month immediately preceding the current reference month
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, carry-forward, threshold grid, level filter, price filter, volatility filter, persistence filter, alternate lag or source blending
signal.ancestry_limitation: BAA10YM is a monthly credit-spread proxy rather than a complete measure of equity risk appetite; the one-month direction and allocation sign are frozen economic assumptions, not conclusions learned from outcomes

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.016666666666666666 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(100000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
